notes: alert_tier_threshold = 2 means we alert on Tier 1 AND Tier 2 (numerically <= 2). Set to 1 to alert on Tier 1 only.
recipients = email recipients. Leave empty [] to disable the email channel.
telegram.enabled = whether to attempt Telegram sends. Token lives in telegram.env.
telegram.chat_ids = list of integer chat_ids (positive for users, negative for groups, -100... for channels). Leave empty to disable Telegram.
Email is sent via Gmail SMTP (smtp.env). Both channels run in parallel; either can fail without affecting the other.

dashboard_url is included as a clickable link in every alert. file:// is clickable from desktop email clients but not from Gmail web — swap for a hosted URL if leadership accesses the dashboard from outside their own machine.
